description: Cross-validation of miniset per-epoch Welch-specparam peak freq vs parent meeglet alpha-band peak
note: Initial cross-validation using full 4-14 Hz range showed r=0.528 due to apples-oranges comparison: parent meeglet stores total PSD (aperiodic+periodic), so young children peak at 4 Hz (aperiodic dominance). Restricting to alpha band (7-14 Hz) gives proper comparison: r=0.809, mean diff 0.13 Hz.
